---
name: Feature request
about: Propose an improvement to Kestrel Desktop or the Kestrel Suite
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Problem

What user or operator problem are you trying to solve?

## Proposed change

Describe the desired behavior.

## Why this matters

Explain why this should exist in Kestrel Desktop or the broader suite.

## Affected surface

- Desktop
- Web / Kestrel One
- CLI
- Evaluations / Ruhroh definitions
- SDK / package layer
- Runtime / shared contracts

## Additional context

Anything else that would help evaluate the request.
